title: tengine.shadergen.sync v1
description: TSDL/constants hot-reload completed (Phase B/C live update). Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SHADERGEN_SYNC in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'. Emitted after each hot-reload pass so subscribers can refresh cached state without polling.

frame.description: GPU frame index when the reload completed

hot_reload_version.description: monotonic counter for TSDL hot-reload generations

constants_changed.description: true if the constants table changed in this reload pass

new_wt_count.description: number of new working-tape entries introduced by this reload

new_wt_ids.description: ids of newly added working-tape entries; length equals new_wt_count
